plist.dict:
CFBundleDevelopmentRegion {DEVELOPMENT_REGION} CFBundleIdentifier {IDENTIFIER} CFBundleName {BUNDLE_NAME} CFBundleShortVersionString {VERSION} DCSDictionaryManufacturerName {MANUFACTURER} DCSDictionaryFrontMatterReferenceID {FRONT_MATTER_ID}{COPYRIGHT_KEY_VAL} DCSDictionaryDefaultPrefs
pronunciation 0 display-column 1 display-picture 1 version 1
DCSDictionaryUseSystemAppearance
